THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF LIBERTY LIFE ASSOC OF BOSTON PLAINTIFF LIBERTY LIFE ASSURANCE COMPANY OF BOSTON IS NOT ENTITLED TO A REFUND OF INSURANCE PREMIUM TAX PAID FOR THE TAX YEARS 1985-1988.
